channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Weezer @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-10 02:00 — Weezer at Chase Center. Weezer's Gathering is a nostalgic event for long-time fans, showcasing their enduring appeal in the alt-rock scene.

item.title: Lily Allen @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-24 03:00 — Lily Allen at Chase Center. Lily Allen's performance of 'West End Girl' offers a fresh take on her classic hits, appealing to both new and old fans.

item.title: Teddy Swims @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-11 03:00 — Teddy Swims at Chase Center. Teddy Swims is gaining buzz for his soulful performances, making this tour a highlight for R&B enthusiasts.

item.title: aespa @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-07 03:00 — aespa at Oakland Arena. aespa's live tour is a significant event in the K-pop scene, promising a high-energy show with a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz's Mountain Tour is highly anticipated, showcasing their innovative blend of genres and strong live reputation.

item.title: Sombr @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — Sombr at SAP Center at San Jose. Sombr's You Are The Reason Tour is gaining traction for its unique sound and engaging live performances.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose. RUSH's Fifty Something tour appeals to classic rock fans and celebrates their legendary status in music history.

item.title: Three Days Grace @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-19 03:00 — Three Days Grace at SAP Center at San Jose. Three Days Grace's Alienation Tour is a chance for fans to experience their hard-hitting rock sound live.

item.title: Tori Amos @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-30 03:00 — Tori Amos at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tori Amos's In Times of Dragons Tour showcases her iconic storytelling and musical prowess.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bleachers' Forever tour is a chance to see a rising star in indie pop with a strong live reputation.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's SURFILMUSIC Tour offers a laid-back vibe perfect for fans of acoustic and soft rock.

item.title: Muse @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-28 02:00 — Muse at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Muse's The Wow! Signal Tour is a highly anticipated event for rock fans, promising an unforgettable experience.

item.title: Train @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-27 01:45 — Train at Shoreline Amphitheatre. TRAIN's Drops of Jupiter tour celebrates their classic hits, appealing to a broad audience.

item.title: Eagles of Death Metal @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Eagles of Death Metal at The Fillmore. Eagles Of Death Metal's Death By Sexy 20th Anniversary Tour is a celebration of their influential sound.

item.title: My Morning Jacket @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-04 03:00 → 2026-10-05 03:00 — My Morning Jacket at The Fillmore. My Morning Jacket's series of shows at The Fillmore promises a deep dive into their expansive discography.

item.title: Mon Laferte @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-07 04:00 — Mon Laferte at SAP Center at San Jose.
